item.title: Queensland family welcomes ‘one-in-15-million’ identical quadruplets
item.description: The naturally conceived birth is so rare doctors believe it may be an Australian first.

item.title: Queensland businesses offered up to $16,000 to hire apprentices as construction worker shortage continues
item.description: There’s even more money in it if the people hired are over 21, women, veterans, Aboriginal or a Torres Strait Islander, or living with a disability.

item.title: The Open 2026: Report claims Bryson DeChambeau wanted Donald Trump's help in rules drama
item.description: The American was handed a two-shot penalty during the second round.

item.title: Family of allegedly murdered Australian woman Meaghan Bowler fight to bring children home
item.description: ‘Meaghan can no longer fight for her children, so we will fight for her.’

item.title: Australian dementia patient backs World Health Organisation recommendations on how to halve cases
item.description: The World Health Organisation revealed almost 50 per cent of cases could be prevented with everyday lifestyle changes.

item.title: Barnaby Joyce dog interview: One Nation MP snaps in interview with ABC’s 730
item.description: One Nation’s star recruit bookended his day with fiery TV appearances.

item.title: Man charged with murdering former British MP and reality TV star Ann Widdecombe
item.description: The conservative activist was found dead at her home following a brutal attack.

item.title: Trump imposes 50 per cent tariff on Canadian imports citing ‘discriminatory treatment’
item.description: The US president’s bold move threatens to reignite a trade war.

item.title: Robbie Williams shoots down viral World Cup video with cheeky response
item.description: The UK singer was appearing on a live broadcast when a white object dropped onto his microphone.

item.title: Julie Goodwin’s simple coconut streusel cake is the ultimate winter afternoon tea treat
item.description: The MasterChef favourite shares her simple recipe for a moist coconut cake finished with a golden streusel topping and served with thick cream.

item.title: Derryn Hinch’s final bombshell: Funeral reveals secret Bette Midler fling
item.description: ‘The only thing history owes the dead is the truth.’

item.title: Who says ice cream is just for summer? Jacob Leung’s winter flavours will change your mind
item.description: Skip the supermarket tub and make your own with Jacob Leung’s sticky date and gingerbread ice cream recipe.

item.title: Cummins, Starc, Hazlewood, Lyon reunited after summer of injury as Aussies name squad to face Bangladesh
item.description: Australia have got their star bowling quartet back together but the toughest call was at the top of the order.

item.title: Duncan Lu’s Vietnamese pho hot pot is the ultimate winter family meal
item.description: Why Duncan Lu says Vietnamese pho hot pot is the comforting winter meal that brings everyone together.

item.title: Sarah Di Lorenzo’s healthy take on Erling Haaland’s viral kebab pizza
item.description: Sarah Di Lorenzo is giving three celebrity recipes a healthy makeover.

item.title: Celebrate World Lamington Day with Steph De Sousa’s classic lamington recipe
item.description: Celebrate World Lamington Day with homemade lamingtons.

item.title: Australian footwear brand FRANKIE4 recalls Amara heels over defect linked to fall risk
item.description: ‘Incidents of the heel detaching without warning have occurred.’

item.title: Sydney Sweeney, Scooter Braun in Australia as actress films new Netflix series Gundam
item.description: There is one detail that has everyone talking after the Euphoria star recently went public with her relationship.

item.title: British singer Jessie J shares ‘difficult’ life update just months after beating breast cancer
item.description: ‘This is the easiest way to let people know the truth, before rumours circulate.’

item.title: Spanish teenager Lamine Yamal spotted praying while fight sours World Cup final’s post-match scenes
item.description: ‘This is THE image of this World Cup.’

item.title: Holly Morton-Bowles and Bianca Jones: Foreign Minister Penny Wong presses Laos over backpacker methanol poisoning deaths
item.description: Penny Wong has expressed disappointment over Laos failing to press serious charges.

item.title: Woman allegedly raped by Yung Filly after Perth show tells court ‘he was my idol’
item.description: A young woman allegedly sexually assaulted by a UK entertainer has told a court the rapper was her hero.

item.title: TV star Georgie Parker leads push to protect vulnerable Australians from winter viruses, including RSV
item.description: One of country’s most familiar faces is leading a push to make sure older Australians are prepared.

item.title: Singer Kate Ceberano reveals shock at deepfake artificial intelligence post showing her crying about late friend Sam Neill
item.description: ’You were tricked and I kinda think this is just the beginning.’

item.title: Former child star Kaylee Hottle dies age 18 in horror car crash
item.description: The deaf actor was best known for her starring role in two ‘Godzilla’ films.

item.title: Middle East war: Donald Trump says US will strike Iranian nuclear site Pickaxe Mountain ‘soon’
item.description: It comes after the deaths of US soldiers just days into the conflict reigniting.

item.title: US war in Iran has cost $A53 billion so far, Hegseth confirms in Senate grilling
item.description: The Secretary of War told a Senate hearing in Washington the figure included anticipated costs through to September.

item.title: Australia’s ‘Doctor Jihad’ found alive in Iraqi Prison years after suspected death alongside ISIS troops
item.description: He was presumed to have been killed during a bloody battle in Syria almost a decade ago.

item.title: Essendon football director Ted Richards has awkward encounter with James Hird mid-interview
item.description: The popular AFL figure was speaking to 7NEWS when ‘the last thing he expected’ actually happened.

item.title: Yellowstone National Park: Uproar as ‘oblivious’ tourists filmed committing dangerous act at natural landmark
item.description: Two tourists have caused outrage after they risked their lives and jail time at an iconic natural wonder.

item.title: Mystery solved: Plane wreck found after crash that killed dozens 74 years ago
item.description: A vintage Pan Am plane that went missing in 1952 has been found after a seven year search.

item.title: Socceroos icon Paul Wade opens up on ‘probable’ chronic traumatic encephalopathy diagnosis
item.description: ‘There is something wrong here ...’

item.title: Barnaby Joyce responds after yelling at his dog during interview
item.description: The One Nation MP said his dog got ‘under his skin’ during the interview.

item.title: Aussie cricket great Dave Warner pleads guilty to Easter drink-drive
item.description: ‘He accepts that was a reckless decision.’

item.title: 'Truth teller' Rebel Wilson cleared in defamation case brought by Australian actor Charlotte MacInnes
item.description: The Hollywood star has scored a major victory.

item.title: High fuel prices have permanently changed the way millions of Australians live
item.description: Five months after the Iran conflict sent fuel prices soaring, many households have no plans to go back.

item.title: Celeste Rivas: Grim details revealed in singer D4vd’s alleged teen killing and dismemberment
item.description: D4vd is accused of stabbing the 14-year-old girl and cutting her body apart in his garage using chainsaws.

item.title: Australian professor Marguerite Johnson and partner Leni Johnson killed in Greece car crash
item.description: Marguerite Johnson, who died alongside partner Leni Johnson, has been remembered as an inspiring teacher and generous mentor.

item.title: Queensland's outback to become Australia's largest rocket testing site at Thargomindah
item.description: The site, five times the size of the ACT, will handle rockets travelling at hypersonic speeds.

item.title: Prince is all smiles as boy George becomes a teenager
item.description: A new photo has been released to mark the future king's 13th birthday.

item.title: US President Donald Trump’s latest threat to Iran amid ongoing Middle East war
item.description: The president says the US will ‘bomb and destroy one bridge or power plant’ for every ship hit by Iran in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Shades of Ariarne Titmus as Aussie teenage sensation Sienna Toohey set for tilt at Commonwealth Games gold
item.description: The 17-year-old shares an ‘ironic’ similarity with one of Australia’s greatest ever.

item.title: Ukraine hits more warehouses of Russia’s top online retailer ‘Wildberries’
item.description: Dramatic footage circulating online shows huge plumes of smoke rising into the air from the blast sites.

item.title: Middle East war: Donald Trump salutes four killed US soldiers as Iran conflict reaches tipping point
item.description: The service members were killed during a recent reignition of conflict between the US and Iran.

item.title: Children’s slide at new Toggerai Park in Appin shut after man hospitalised
item.description: The slide was given the tick of ‘approval’ by the planning minister, but it has since been sealed shut.

item.title: Greek court rejects Australia’s request to extradite James Dalamangas
item.description: A legal loophole has allowed one of Australia’s most wanted men to avoid extradition.

item.title: Tasmania Devils strike Ken Hinkley campaign issue and delete promo page
item.description: The new club has quickly hit the delete button after the unexpected problem came out of nowhere.

item.title: The Odyssey: Elon Musk claims Grok AI platform will make a more ‘accurate’ film than Christopher Nolan
item.description: The trillionaire declared the film will be ‘historically accurate and true to the art of Homer’.

item.title: Escalator mishap rattles Labor conference as Albanese unveils major workplace reforms
item.description: The prime minister narrowly avoided a fall before kicking off the conference.

item.title: New warning for Ozempic, Wegovy and Mounjaro over serious eye disorder including blindness
item.description: The regulator said no treatment has been shown to improve the condition once it develops.

item.title: Thousands of Victorian teachers strike in Melbourne over rejected pay deal
item.description: Teachers say the dispute is about more than just money, demanding better conditions, higher pay for support staff, less time spent in meetings, and smaller class sizes.

item.title: Sydney greyhound track Wentworth Park to be demolished for housing and parklands months early
item.description: ‘Wentworth Park belongs to the public, not an industry that kills dogs as a hobby.’

item.title: US military launches attacks on Iran for 12th straight night as civilian infrastructure threatened
item.description: The US military launched its latest wave of attacks following an ominous threat from the president.

item.title: Melbourne Storm superstar Cam Munster in talks over bombshell move to PNG Chiefs
item.description: ‘We have been in constant communication with Melbourne.’

item.title: Sydney Sixers back in captain Ash Gardner after allegations of affair with teammate
item.description: The general manager has made her position very clear and has been in touch with the captain.

item.title: SA family’s desperate bid to save three‑year‑old daughter from rare brain cancer
item.description: Doctors told Elsie Avery’s parents the little girl ‘won’t live long enough’ for conventional treatment.

item.title: ‘Barnaby’s Dog Leads’: One Nation capitalises on viral moment with AI images
item.description: ‘For every dog who has quietly decided that today is not the day for instructions.’

item.title: Parents of ‘Doctor Jihad’ speak about their shock after he was found alive in Iraq
item.description: ‘I can’t explain how I felt getting that call.’

item.title: Yang Chin-ping: Taiwanese woman sentenced to 11 years in jail after poisoning Australian boyfriend Alex Shorey to stop him from leaving
item.description: Alex Shorey was on an exchange program in Taiwan when he met the widow in her late 40s.

item.title: Wests Tigers in crisis again as star half Adam Doueihi walks out after ‘dust-up’ with coach Benji Marshall
item.description: The key man swiftly pulled himself out of this weekend’s line-up and left the club.

item.title: LIV Golf’s $57m Michigan season finale set to be cancelled
item.description: The news spells danger for the embattled league’s bid to secure funding for 2027 and beyond.

item.title: Australia Post veteran loses unfair dismissal fight after KFC visit during work hours
item.description: The Fair Work Commission ultimately sided with the employer.

item.title: Players and supporter charged after under-18s NSW rugby league brawl leaves man hospitalised
item.description: Two teams remain stood down while police investigate after a 71-year-old man was hospitalised.

item.title: Australia’s highly anticipated 2027 Ashes schedule announced as five Tests in six weeks loom
item.description: The dates and venues are locked in for what looms as the last tour of England for several Aussie veterans.

item.title: Commonwealth Games 2026: Australia’s youngest and oldest competitors gunning for Games gold
item.description: With a 61-year age gap, the pair have their eyes on the prize in Glasgow.

item.title: Major $4.6 billion investment indicates Albanese Government is still fully behind AUKUS nuclear submarines
item.description: Despite public debate over the deal’s future, the Albanese government is backing it in with $4.6 billion.

item.title: Ivan Cleary addresses chinks in Panthers’ armour after scare against Parramatta
item.description: The master coach had a very blunt answer when the question naturally came.

item.title: Family of Minnesota lawmaker reveal fury over her murderer’s sentence
item.description: ‘It will not offer me peace of mind that he will have room and board provided for the rest of his life, paid for by my tax dollars.’

item.title: Trump administration to impose new double-digit tariffs on Australian exports
item.description: ‘Today’s action will begin to correct what is both a human rights abuse and distortive trade practice to improve the welfare of workers everywhere.’

item.title: Worker killed and another injured as mining truck reverses over vehicle at Peak Downs mine in Queensland
item.description: Operations have been suspended across all BMA sites for 24 hours after the fatal collision.

item.title: Craig McRae makes classy gesture to Izak Rankine while condemning Isaac Quaynor booing
item.description: Craig McRae says he fails to understand it but many supporters don’t want to hear about it.

item.title: Australian Commonwealth Games team split by Gina Rinehart’s big-money medal bonus
item.description: ‘Good luck to the swimmers, I guess. They have someone backing that performance, but that’s a separate matter for them.’

item.title: New UK PM Andy Burnham assures Anthony Albanese of Rabbitohs support
item.description: The two leaders hit it off with promises of ‘unwavering commitment’ in their first phone call.

item.title: Swim star Adam Ramsay-Peaty shows off new name after marrying into famous family
item.description: A family feud is in the past as the Commonwealth Games gold medallist declares ‘I’ll make sure the swimming does the talking’.

item.title: The Australian athletes to watch in the 2026 Commonwealth Games
item.description: The Australians always flex in the pool but this year our track stars are ready to burn it up.

item.title: Jessica Fox underlines GOAT status with inspirational world championship gold medal
item.description: ‘It takes a village to get you from the hospital bed to back in a boat. I’m back on top and it feels bloody good.’

item.title: Kyle Sandilands launches new show and reveals which former Kyle And Jackie O staff are on the team
item.description: The former KIIS FM radio host’s new gig is taking shape, as Jackie ‘O’ Henderson continues her legal battle with their former employer ARN.

item.title: Norway set to lodge formal complaint over Trump’s role in World Cup red card controversy
item.description: The country wants FIFA to admit its ‘error’ and claims ‘the whole game is at risk’.

item.title: Medical staff under investigation for alleged ‘inappropriate access’ of Tony Modra health records
item.description: The premier has called it a ‘disappointing development’ and says jobs could be on the line.

item.title: Serious medical emergency ends Cats defender Georgie Rankin’s AFLW season
item.description: The 28-year-old was sent straight to hospital after a freak accident at training.

item.title: Microsoft Teams outage leaves users unable to join meetings across Australia and Asia
item.description: The outage disrupted work for thousands of Microsoft Teams users.

item.title: Homeless man arrested after two alleged sexual assaults in Melbourne’s southwest
item.description: One woman was allegedly threatened with a knife before being sexually assaulted in her own home.

item.title: Geelong captain Patrick Dangerfield makes call to sign one-year contract extension
item.description: The 37-year-old has made up his mind after weighing up his future.

item.title: Socceroos star Cristian Volpato accused of speeding before alleged positive cocaine test
item.description: Police stopped the 22-year-old twice in a matter of hours.

item.title: Channel Seven stylist launches fashion label ENESA: The workwear brand helping women get dressed
item.description: No more wardrobe guesswork.

item.title: 2026 Volkswagen Amarok Dark Label V6: Blacked-out special priced for Australia
item.description: For those who want a more sinister-looking Amarok but don’t want to wait for Walkinshaw’s W600, Volkswagen has begun rolling out the Dark Label.

item.title: Ford Mustang Mach-E recalled
item.description: A part could break in certain rear-wheel drive Ford Mustang Mach-E SUVs, leading to unexpected movement when parked or power loss when driving.

item.title: Reg Chard, Australia’s last surviving Kokoda veteran, dies aged 102
item.description: ‘Your legacy is all around us.’

item.title: Australia's best-selling hybrids so far in 2026
item.description: Hybrid sales have continued to grow in Australia and Toyota remains the hybrid leader, despite a drop in deliveries.

item.title: Former Gold Coast teacher Robert John Thomas charged with making explicit images of children using artificial intelligence
item.description: The 73-year-old allegedly used his work laptop and AI software to create the images.

item.description: Follow all the big moments from the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games, live and free on Seven and 7plus Sport.

item.title: Sydney commuters warned of major transport disruptions this weekend
item.description: Metro services, train lines and major roads are all set to be disrupted this weekend.

item.title: Honda previews next-generation ute, Australian launch possible
item.description: A new Honda Ridgeline has been teased in North America, with the door now open for a potential Australian launch.

item.title: ARN wins right to use Kyle Sandilands documents in Jackie O court fight
item.description: Documents filed by Kyle Sandilands and his manager will form a part of ARN’s case as the battle over their great KIIS FM blow-up continues.

item.description: A father-of-two died just five weeks after the family celebrated buying a Tesla Model Y.

item.title: Families of the Sea World helicopter crash victims give statements on closing day of inquest
item.description: Nicholas Tadros was just 10 years old when he lost his mum and his leg in the helicopter disaster. But his battle isn’t over yet.

item.description: The item sold in NSW stores could cause illness if consumed.

item.title: 7NEWS mourns beloved journalist Gina Treharne after cancer battle
item.description: ‘She was the best of us and we will miss her.’

item.title: Rare treatment unlocked for three-year-old South Australian girl with rare brain cancer
item.description: Elsie Avery is just three years old and diagnosed with a rare and aggressive tumour on her brain stem.

item.description: Authorities have cordoned off the area and urged locals to remain inside.

item.title: Asbestos find inside Perth home leaves grandmother facing $115,000 demolition bill
item.description: ‘This has been really devastating.’

item.description: A Supreme Court battle is being waged over a prisoner’s bid to switch prisons after changing gender.

item.description: Melbourne are facing a 16-year first after a disastrous night against South Sydney.

item.description: The fight injured a music producer three years ago.

item.description: ‘When it rains, it pours, sometimes.’

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.
